overall.description: Gameplay footage exploring the Slytherin common room from a Harry Potter video game, featuring gothic stone architecture, large underwater windows viewing the lake, and students in dark robes. The camera moves smoothly through the dimly lit space with greenish-blue ambient lighting filtering through the water outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow entry corridor with house tapestries

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridor with tapestries and wall sconces

entered.detail: large vertical tapestry depicting a silver snake on green background
ornate carved stone pillar with mossy texture
medieval-style wall-mounted lantern with warm glow

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow stone corridor with mossy walls and a prominent Slytherin snake tapestry. The camera moves forward through the enclosed space, passing wall sconces that provide warm artificial lighting against the cool stone.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with central fireplace

events.description: exits narrow corridor into large open common room with high vaulted ceilings

agents.ego_description: entering the main common room and walking toward the central fireplace area

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes standing near a floor lamp

entered.detail: large ornate stone fireplace with burning fire and serpent sculptures
large circular patterned rug covering the stone floor
dark leather seating arranged around the fireplace
tall standing lamp with glowing shade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a grand gothic common room with a large fireplace as the focal point. The camera moves through the space passing leather armchairs and standing lamps, with students visible in the background. The lighting shifts from warm artificial to a mix with cool blue tones from unseen windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: lounge area with underwater lake views

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the lake surface through the large underwater windows

agents.ego_description: walking toward the windows and looking up at the underwater lake view

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a sofa conversing near the window

entered.detail: tall arched windows showing underwater lake view with blue-green light
large ornate terrestrial globe on wooden stand
upholstered seating with tufted green velvet fabric

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the far wall featuring massive underwater windows that illuminate the room with ethereal blue-green light. Students sit on velvet sofas near an antique globe. The camera then tilts upward to gaze at the lake surface visible through the rippling water outside the glass.

scene_state.functional_zone: common room seating area with chess table

agents.ego_description: walking through the lounge area passing various furniture groupings and students

entered.detail: large ornate stone fireplace now visible from the opposite side of the room
wooden table with chess board set up for play
decorative fabric hangings depicting medieval scenes

segments.scene_description: Moving back through the common room, the camera passes a chess table and various seating arrangements. The fireplace comes back into view from the opposite side while students walk through the space. The room features wall tapestries and potted plants among the gothic stone architecture.

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone staircase toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: approaching and climbing the grand stone staircase

notable_agents.action: student walking up the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with carved balustrades leading upward
stone statue of a robed figure at the top of the stairs
gothic arched stone doorway framing the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and begins ascending a grand stone staircase with ornate railings. A statue stands at the landing above, and other students are seen climbing the stairs. The architecture features heavy stone arches and columns typical of gothic design.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper corridor with stained glass ceiling

events.description: enters upper corridor with arched stained glass ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: continuing up the stairs into the vaulted upper corridor

entered.detail: vaulted ceiling with green-tinted stained glass windows emitting colored light
continuation of stone stairs in the narrower upper passage
decorative wrought iron railings along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera entering an upper corridor with a stunning vaulted ceiling featuring stained glass windows that cast green light downward. The space is narrower and more enclosed than the common room below, with stone stairs continuing upward and iron railings along the walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, mossy corridor into a grand gothic common room before ascending toward a vaulted upper gallery. It begins by gliding through an enclosed stone hallway past a Slytherin snake tapestry, then opens into a vast living space where warm firelight blends with cool blue tones as the camera passes leather armchairs and students. The perspective shifts toward massive underwater windows that bathe the room in ethereal blue-green light from the lake, before turning back across chess tables and potted plants toward the center of the hall. The camera then ascends a grand stone staircase past ornate railings and a landing statue, finally entering a narrower upper corridor defined by a vaulted ceiling and stained glass windows that cast a deep green glow downward.
